summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 4 triangle centers overlaid on morphing triangle ABC. ValueTracker s_tr tours 4 configs. always_redraw rebuilds BLUE triangle + GREEN centroid (A+B+C)/3 + YELLOW circumcenter (solved from perpendicular bisectors) + ORANGE orthocenter (altitudes) + PURPLE incenter (aA+bB+cC)/(a+b+c) + RED Euler line through O, G, H.
